options.title: Minor and Concentration Requirements
options.description: Complete seven 4-unit courses as follows. Other relevant courses from related disciplines may be substituted with prior approval of the department. At least five courses approved for the minor must be upper-division. One course may be taken on a Passed/Not Passed basis.

options.title: Conservation Biology Minor
options.description: Select four to six courses from the following list or any courses associated with the Field Biology Quarter or the Marine Biology Quarter or approved equivalent. A maximum of two Geography courses may be applied to the minor.
courses: EE BIOL 100 - Introduction to Ecology and Behavior
EE BIOL 116 - Conservation Biology
